hero.heading: Gapflow and Stripe
hero.subheading: Automate payments, subscriptions, and financial workflows

documentation.title: Getting Started with Stripe
documentation.description: Connect Stripe to Gapflow and automate payment processing, subscriptions, and financial workflows.

documentation.title: Subscription Management
documentation.description: Automate recurring billing, handle upgrades/downgrades, and manage subscription lifecycles.

documentation.title: Webhooks & Events
documentation.description: Listen to Stripe events in real-time and trigger workflows for payments, invoices, and customer actions.

tutorials.title: Automated Subscription Onboarding
tutorials.description: Build complete subscription workflows from sign-up to activation with payment processing and provisioning.

tutorials.title: Failed Payment Recovery
tutorials.description: Create dunning workflows that recover failed payments with smart retries and customer communication.

tutorials.title: Revenue Operations Dashboard
tutorials.description: Set up automated revenue tracking, MRR calculations, and financial reporting from Stripe data.

faqs.question: How do I connect Stripe?
faqs.answer: Use API keys (publishable and secret) from your Stripe dashboard. Restrict keys to necessary permissions for security.

faqs.question: Can I handle subscriptions?
faqs.answer: Yes! Create, update, cancel subscriptions. Handle trials, proration, upgrades, downgrades, and billing cycles automatically.

faqs.question: What about failed payments?
faqs.answer: Stripe Smart Retries handles initial attempts. Build workflows for additional recovery, customer notification, and grace periods.

faqs.question: How do I process refunds?
faqs.answer: Issue full or partial refunds automatically. Track refund reasons, update customer accounts, and maintain accurate reporting.

faqs.question: Can I support multiple currencies?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Process payments in 135+ currencies. Handle currency conversion and display prices based on customer location.

faqs.question: What about fraud prevention?
faqs.answer: Stripe Radar provides fraud scores. Build rules to block suspicious payments, request verification, or flag for review.

testimonials.quote: Subscription automation handles 10K+ customers flawlessly. From sign-up to renewal, everything just works.
testimonials.author: Rachel Green

testimonials.quote: Failed payment recovery increased MRR 15%. Smart dunning workflows win back customers automatically.
testimonials.author: James Wilson

testimonials.quote: Revenue reporting is real-time. Finance team has instant visibility into ARR, MRR, churn, everything.
testimonials.author: Maria Garcia

testimonials.quote: Customer provisioning is instant. Payment completes, account activates in seconds. No manual work.
testimonials.author: David Kumar

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: 100 read requests and 100 write requests per second in live mode. Test mode has lower limits. Use webhooks for events.

limits.title: Webhook Delivery
limits.description: Webhooks retry with exponential backoff for up to 3 days. Ensure your endpoint is reliable and responds quickly.

limits.title: Payment Methods
limits.description: Support varies by region. Check Stripe docs for available payment methods in your target markets.

limits.title: Subscription Complexity
limits.description: Very complex subscription models may need careful design. Consider using Stripe Billing for advanced scenarios.
